title: The Cutchi Memons Act, 1938
full_text: The Cutchi Memons Act, 1938 कच्‍छी मेमन अधिनियम,1938 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 193810 Act Number: 10 Enactment Date: 1938-04-08 Act Year: 1938 Short Title: The Cutchi Memons Act, 1938 Hindi Title: कच्‍छी मेमन अधिनियम,1938 Long Title: An Act to provide that all Cutchi Memons shall be governed in matters of succession and inheritance by the Muhammad an Law. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Cutchi Memons to be governed in certain matters by Muhammadan Law. Section 3. Savings. Section 4. Repealed.
